calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Aug-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Shahbazian appeared by zoom for Tarun Vig (petitioner).

Mr. Shahbazian stated that a supplement was filed on July 1st which addressed some of the issues that were raised by the probate examiner, that he does not know what the deal is with the tenants as he has never dealt with this before, and that the tenant is renting from the trust and will continue to rent from the trust. The court noted that no one was here to object. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Asset is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Jul-03-2024 Continued To Aug-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
